---
title: "{{TITLE}}"
subtitle: "{{SUBTITLE}}"
author: "Research"
date: "{{DATE}}"
format:
  html:
    theme: [cosmo, styles.scss]
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: Contents
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    anchor-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 260px
      body-width: 820px
      margin-width: 200px
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://rsms.me/">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://rsms.me/inter/inter.css">
        <style>
          html { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
          @supports (font-variation-settings: normal) {
            html { font-family: 'Inter var', sans-serif; }
          }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="report-meta">
  <div class="report-meta-item"><strong>Window</strong>{{WINDOW}}</div>
  <div class="report-meta-item"><strong>Sources</strong>{{SOURCES}}</div>
  <div class="report-meta-item"><strong>Method</strong>{{METHOD}}</div>
  <div class="report-meta-item"><strong>Author</strong>{{AUTHOR}}</div>
</div>
```

## Executive summary

{{EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY_PARAGRAPH}}

::: {.callout-tip}
**The recommendation, in one line.** {{ONE_LINE_RECOMMENDATION}}
:::

## Headline numbers

```{=html}
<div class="stat-grid">
  <div class="stat">
    <div class="stat-label">{{STAT_1_LABEL}}</div>
    <div class="stat-value">{{STAT_1_VALUE}}</div>
    <div class="stat-detail">{{STAT_1_DETAIL}}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat">
    <div class="stat-label">{{STAT_2_LABEL}}</div>
    <div class="stat-value">{{STAT_2_VALUE}}</div>
    <div class="stat-detail">{{STAT_2_DETAIL}}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat">
    <div class="stat-label">{{STAT_3_LABEL}}</div>
    <div class="stat-value">{{STAT_3_VALUE}}</div>
    <div class="stat-detail">{{STAT_3_DETAIL}}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat">
    <div class="stat-label">{{STAT_4_LABEL}}</div>
    <div class="stat-value">{{STAT_4_VALUE}}</div>
    <div class="stat-detail">{{STAT_4_DETAIL}}</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Methodology

{{METHODOLOGY_PARAGRAPH}}

## Findings

{{FINDINGS_BODY}}

<!--
  Visual primitives available:

  Status badges (inline):
    <span class="badge badge-avoid">Avoid</span>
    <span class="badge badge-wait">Wait</span>
    <span class="badge badge-medium">Medium</span>
    <span class="badge badge-post">Post now</span>
    <span class="badge badge-clean">Clean</span>
    <span class="badge badge-blocked">Blocked</span>

  Bar chart for comparisons:
    ```{=html}
    <div class="bar-chart">
      <div class="bar-row">
        <div class="bar-label">Item A</div>
        <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill danger" style="width: 100%"></div></div>
        <div class="bar-value">79</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    ```
    Variants: .bar-fill (default), .danger, .warn, .muted

  Mermaid diagrams (flow, gantt, sequence):
    ```{mermaid}
    flowchart LR
      A[Start] --> B[End]
    ```

  Callouts:
    ::: {.callout-tip}        opportunity
    ::: {.callout-note}       neutral info
    ::: {.callout-warning}    caution
    ::: {.callout-important}  high-stakes risk

  Comparison tables — use these classes for cell content:
    <span class="yes">Yes</span>
    <span class="no">No</span>
    <span class="unique">Yes — unique</span>
-->

## Recommendations

{{RECOMMENDATIONS_BODY}}

## Methodology notes

::: {.methodology}
{{METHODOLOGY_NOTES_DETAIL}}
:::

::: {.report-footer}
Report compiled {{DATE}}. Source: `research/{{UMBRELLA}}/{{SLUG}}/.build/report.qmd`.
:::
